evidence_note: Implementation overlay uses curated KB signals plus conservative TIN format hints. Validate exact local treatment before build lock.

tin.local_label: Unique Taxpayer Reference (UTR) / National Insurance Number (NINO)
tin.applicability: Account holder or controlling person TIN must be interpreted by that person’s tax residence jurisdiction; this local overlay applies when the tax residence is United Kingdom.
tin.mandatory_state: Conditional - required when CRS rules and the account holder tax residence require a TIN; otherwise capture reason for absence where permitted.
tin.missing_data_action: Open TIN remediation/outreach; do not fabricate placeholder values; capture reasonable-efforts evidence and apply only verified local missing-TIN treatment.
tin.validation_rule: Configure regex and any checksum only after Compliance confirms the official TIN guidance for the selected reporting year.
tin.verification_task: Confirm accepted individual/entity TIN formats, mandatory/conditional treatment, and permitted missing-TIN reason codes before production validation.

nil_reporting.state: Not required unless FI has made a threshold election for de minimis
nil_reporting.process: Configure zero-reportable-account workflow according to the verified local rule.
nil_reporting.deadline: 31 May following the 31 December reporting year-end
nil_reporting.zero_account_treatment: If no reportable accounts exist, do not assume no action; execute the jurisdiction-specific nil/no-reportable workflow only after verification.
nil_reporting.verification_task: Confirm whether a nil declaration, zero-record file, portal attestation or no filing is required for the selected reporting year.

self_certification.validity_rule: Self-certification must be complete, signed/accepted and reasonable against other KYC information; it should be refreshed or cured on change in circumstances or unreliability. Do not apply a fixed refresh cycle unless verified locally.
self_certification.change_in_circumstances_trigger: Address, tax residence, entity classification, controlling-person, documentation or indicia changes that make the existing self-certification unreliable.
self_certification.refresh_requirement: Needs verification - confirm any jurisdiction-specific cure or refresh timing before configuring workflow SLAs.
self_certification.missing_action: Trigger self-certification remediation, document outreach and reasonableness review, and block unsupported reportability decisions until resolved or approved.
self_certification.verification_task: Confirm local self-certification cure, reliability and change-in-circumstances handling before setting operational SLA or blocking logic.

material_differences.What Changes: Local TIN label/format and permitted missing-TIN treatment must be configured for United Kingdom.
material_differences.Implementation Impact: TIN validation, remediation queues and reason-code handling must be jurisdiction-configurable.
material_differences.Verification Task: Confirm local TIN format, missing-TIN treatment and accepted reason codes before UAT.

material_differences.What Changes: Not required unless FI has made a threshold election for de minimis
material_differences.Implementation Impact: Zero-reportable-account processing must not be assumed from global CRS baseline.
material_differences.Verification Task: Confirm nil/no-reportable filing treatment for reporting year before production calendar setup.

material_differences.What Changes: HMRC AEOI Online Service / Combined CRS+FATCA XML schema (HMRC format) until 31 December 2026; from 1 January 2027: OECD CRS XML v3.0 (OECD October 2024) for CRS + IRS FATCA XML for FATCA
material_differences.Implementation Impact: Portal, schema version, acknowledgements, rejection handling and correction workflow must be configurable by jurisdiction.
material_differences.Verification Task: Confirm current portal, schema/version and rejection process before end-to-end UAT.

material_differences.What Changes: No unsupported fixed refresh cycle is assumed.
material_differences.Implementation Impact: Workflow SLAs, blocking rules and reasonableness checks must be configured only after local policy/legal confirmation.
material_differences.Verification Task: Confirm cure window, change-in-circumstances process and stale/unreliable treatment.
